core_mechanism: an emergent scale-invariant (conformal, SL(2,R)) symmetry near a limiting boundary that universally fixes a thermal Planck/Bose-Einstein response spectrum and an entropy proportional to the boundary's area, independent of the system's dimensional or topological details
brief_reason: The abstract states that the radiation and thermodynamic properties are universally governed by the same near-horizon conformal quantum mechanics regardless of the (2+1)-dimensional topological nature, yielding a Planck spectrum at a fixed temperature and an area-proportional entropy with the correct 1/4 factor.
